questions.question: Describe the main purpose of IP Security (IPSec) in detail, explaining its components and protocols used. (15 marks)
What are the key differences between IPsec's 'Encapsulating Security Payload' (ESP) and 'Authentication Header' (AH)? Provide examples of each mode of operation to illustrate your answer. (15 marks)

Describe the process of combining security associations (SA) in route-based mobile IP, including the role of the Mobile IPv4 (MIPv4) protocol and the 'FAST' (Fast Handover for Mobile IP Version 4) procedure. (15 marks)
